topic: multiplying fractions and mixed numbers, multi-step word problems
latex:
You bike $7\frac{4}{5}$ miles from your house to a state park. You travel $\frac{3}{5}$ of that distance in the woods. You bike along the bank of a stream for the last $\frac{1}{2}$ of the woods. On how many miles of your trip do you bike along the bank of the stream? Write your answer as a fraction or mixed number in simplest form.

$\underline{\hspace{1cm}}$ mile(s)
